context: Checks whether Reflect honors a research-only request while still giving complete, useful recommendations.

checklist.name: No apply claim
checklist.description: The output does not claim to edit memory, instruction files, hooks, specs, or skills.

checklist.name: Research result format
checklist.description: The output is a ranked research report or proposal list rather than a generic reflection summary.

checklist.name: Wide target inventory
checklist.description: The output lists at least eight possible persistence surfaces, including memory, instruction files, docs, specs, skills, hooks, templates, and backlog/issues.

checklist.name: Apply plan included
checklist.description: The output includes a later implementation plan with verification, but clearly marks it as not yet executed.

checklist.name: Evidence gate retained
checklist.description: The output states that candidates need conversation evidence and duplicate/conflict checks before persistence.

checklist.name: Risk handling
checklist.description: The output identifies contested, low-confidence, or broad-scope changes that need approval.

checklist.name: Repo-agnostic language
checklist.description: Recommendations are framed so they can apply to different projects, with project-specific examples clearly labeled as examples.

checklist.name: Concise prioritization
checklist.description: The output separates high-impact near-term changes from speculative ideas.
